title: malva spinosa
intro: Malva spinosa, also known as the spiny mallow or prickly mallow, is a perennial plant species within the mallow family (Malvaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help soothe sore throats, wounds, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Malva spinosa include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, as well as being used in topical creams and salves, to harness its medicinal properties.
